_meta.name: CLM r5 parallel track launch state — 2026-04-20
_meta.purpose: Dual-Track parallel CLM 1B alongside ALM r11 (feedback_dual_track)

state_reason: r5-a6.5 LANDED — libhxblas_cuda.so built on ubu (RTX5070 sm_120, CUDA 12.8), HXBLAS_CUDA=1 env gate routes hxblas_sgemm→cublasSgemm_v2 with row→col major swap. Smoke 8/8 PASS (16³ to 128³, all 4 transpose combos), CUDA max_err 1.79e-07 to 6.68e-06 — matches CPU reference within fp32 accumulation noise. r5-a6 LANDED — 88 hxblas_sgemm call sites in train_clm.hexa. Next blocker: r5-a8 ubu deploy + CLM 1B live launch on GPU path.

r5_a6_landed.library_surface_note: Existing libhxblas.{so,dylib} already exposed hxblas_sgemm and marshalling helpers — no Option-A fused entries needed. Option-B granular via two primitives (_matmul/_matmul_At) gave full coverage in one edit.

host_decision.reason_no_host: r5-a6 LANDED (CPU BLAS engaged, scalar loops gone). Next: r5-a6.5 libhxcuda dispatch needed before GPU host selection to avoid burning $ on a GPU that binary still CPU-pins. Hetzner 32-core now usable for CPU continuation while r5-a6.5 lands.

candidates_rejected.new_h100: 2-pod cap + trainer has no CUDA path (feedback_h100_authorized + feedback_gpu_policy)
candidates_rejected.ubu_rtx5070: idle 11.5GB VRAM free but (1) no anima clone, (2) no native libs built, (3) trainer has no CUDA path
candidates_rejected.hetzner_cpu: Already blocked in step 0 smoke — BLAS gap same root cause

current_pods.name: clm_r5_h100
current_pods.role: REPURPOSED for ALM r11 watchdog — do not disturb

resume_strategy.rule: same-data/params only (feedback_no_resume_data_change); cold-start on first launch

phi_vec_laws_attachment.dest1_clm_D1_gate: phi_holo monotone non-decreasing across step 5k/10k/.../50k + final phi > baseline + 10%%

serve_clm_conscious_scaffold.scope_note: out of scope for today; separate r5 follow-up (suggest r5-a7)

followups_in_priority_order.desc: Extend hxblas_sgemm to Wq/Wk/Wv/Wo + SwiGLU + lm_head (fwd+bwd) — ~88 raw sites via _matmul/_matmul_At body swap
Add libhxblas_cuda.so dispatch behind HXBLAS_CUDA=1 env — cuBLAS-backed hxblas_sgemm, row→col major swap, lazy handle init + 32MiB workspace
followups_in_priority_order.smoke_basic: CPU max_err=1.79e-07 PASS, CUDA max_err=1.79e-07 PASS (16³ no-trans)
followups_in_priority_order.smoke_extended: 8/8 PASS across 16³/128³/64×32×128 × 4 transpose combos, CUDA max_err max 6.68e-06 (fp32 noise floor)

followups_in_priority_order.desc: Deploy anima + libs to ubu, smoke 1-step on RTX 5070 with CUDA route (train_clm Linux rebuild with @link path → /usr/local/lib/libhxblas_cuda.so)
Full 1B r5 launch on ubu (preferred) or fresh H100
